title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama repo that bundles Llama 2, Code Llama, and other open-source LLMs into a single CLI tool with a built-in model registry and REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models for chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: llama-index-integrations/llama-index-llms-ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embedding drivers for local Ollama models; plug into RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now renamed “Open WebUI”); supports RAG, multimodal, and admin controls.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI chat wrapper around Ollama with conversation history and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like code-completion service powered by Ollama Code Llama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) for Ollama with one-line docker run commands.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Minimal Next.js chatbot frontend that streams responses from a local Ollama instance.

title: oll4ma
summary: Lightweight Rust client library for Ollama with async Tokio runtime.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for integrating Ollama models into Rails or standalone scripts.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client for Ollama; generate, chat, and pull models idiomatically.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that uses Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI service that adds OpenAI-compatible endpoints on top of Ollama for drop-in replacement.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension that brings Ollama code generation and explanation into the editor sidebar.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for deploying, fine-tuning, and chaining Ollama models in real-world scenarios.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Curated Modelfile collection for quantizing and running community models (Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with Ollama.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that answers questions using local Ollama models and supports slash commands.
